pi_items.source: Task description line specifies 'Set Site Name to: Urban Electronics'. Store created in seed_products.php line 26 with name='Urban Electronics'. This is the correct specification for the task.
Task description specifies 'Set Slogan to: Premium Tech, Unbeatable Prices'. This exact string is what the agent must configure. Verifier checks for this exact value in verifier.py line 52.

Task description specifies 'Set the Default Front Page to: /products'. setup_drupal_commerce.sh creates a product_catalog view at path 'products' (line 319), which becomes /products. Verifier normalizes by stripping leading slash and checks for 'products'.
Task description and metadata both specify this page title. Task requires creation of a Basic Page with this title.
Task description specifies 'Return Policy' (URL alias: /return-policy). Verifier checks for this exact alias.

Task description specifies body text must contain 'Items may be returned within 30 days of purchase' and 'Products must be in original packaging'. Metadata extracts these as required phrases. Verifier checks for both (line 99).
Task description and metadata both specify this page title. Task requires creation of a Basic Page with this title.
Task description specifies 'Shipping Information' (URL alias: /shipping-info). Verifier checks for this exact alias.
Task description specifies body text must contain 'free standard shipping on all orders over $50'. Metadata extracts these as required phrases. Verifier checks for both (line 122).
Task description specifies menu link 'Shop' -> /products. Metadata confirms title='Shop' with uri_suffix='products'.
Task description specifies 'Shop' -> /products. Metadata uri_suffix is 'products'. Verifier checks if uri_suffix is in the actual URI (line 147).
Task description specifies menu link 'Return Policy' -> /return-policy. Metadata confirms this link.
Task description specifies 'Return Policy' -> /return-policy. Metadata uri_suffix is 'return-policy'.
Task description specifies menu link 'Shipping Information' -> /shipping-info. Metadata confirms this link.
Task description specifies 'Shipping Information' -> /shipping-info. Metadata uri_suffix is 'shipping-info'.
Task description specifies menu link 'Contact Us' -> /contact. Metadata confirms this link.
Task description specifies 'Contact Us' -> /contact. Metadata uri_suffix is 'contact'.

privileged_info_summary: This is a Drupal Commerce store configuration task where the agent must configure 'Urban Electronics' as the site name with slogan 'Premium Tech, Unbeatable Prices' and set the default front page to /products. The agent must create two basic pages: 'Return Policy' with required text containing '30 days' and 'original packaging' at alias /return-policy, and 'Shipping Information' with required text containing 'free standard shipping' and '$50' at alias /shipping-info. Both pages must be published. The agent must also add four menu links to the main navigation: Shop (/products), Return Policy (/return-policy), Shipping Information (/shipping-info), and Contact Us (/contact). All metadata claims are internally consistent with the task description and verifier logic.
